generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor of the MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind the gearbox of the MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for measuring drive current in MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured current data from the MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque data derived from current and position sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted, MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from motor position encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler, FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulatedCoulombViscousData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated Coulomb-Viscous friction model output data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted, MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulatedStribeckData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated Stribeck friction model output data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted, MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulatedDahlData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated Dahl friction model output data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted, MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulatedLuGreData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated LuGre friction model output data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted, MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SysML_BDD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysML_IBD_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of the MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for friction model simulation and multi-physics analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from physical robot to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for data linking and interoperability in the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for motion accuracy improvement"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionIdentificationInsight, EnhanceRobotControlAlgorithmAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualization for real-time motion accuracy improvement"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction identification insights used to enhance robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot motion accuracy for operational insights"
]

instance EnhanceRobotControlAlgorithmAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic enhancement of robot control algorithms based on friction identification insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MABI_MAX_100_FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot system under study"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor component in the MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in the MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component in the MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance MABI_MAX_100_FirstAxis_Environment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing, as indicated by live measurements and MQTT-based data transmission."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of physical robot components (motor, gearboxes), sensors, MQTT data streaming, processing components (simulation models), and dashboard visualization within the digital shadow framework."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, utilizing live operational data for continuous friction model identification during robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data versus measured data; use of analytical (white-box) and data-driven (black-box) friction models for multi-physics-aware identification."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data transmission from physical sensors to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards and SysML modeling language for system engineering."
]
